name: Country Hearth Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 can VEG-ALL Mixed Vegetables with liquid (16 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a heavy soup pot. Season the beef with salt and pepper, then sauté until golden brown.
2. Add onion, thyme, and sage. Mix and sauté for another 5 minutes.
3. Pour in beef broth and let simmer uncovered for 30 minutes.
4. Stir in egg noodles into boiling stock and cook for 10 minutes.
5. Add vegetables with liquid and continue to simmer for 5 more minutes.
6. Divide the stew evenly into a casserole dish. Top with crushed soda crackers and bake at 350°F for 20 minutes.
